title: hieracium australe subsp. cuspidatum
intro: Hieracium australe subsp. cuspidatum, commonly known as a lesser hawkweed or Hieracium cuspidatum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hieracium australe subsp. cuspidatum include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. In herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, with the leaves, flowers, and roots being used for their medicinal properties.
